title: Sass & Belle Monster Bottle – 400ml Reusable BPA-Free with Foldable Straw, Fun Googly Eyes Design, Lightweight & Durable Boys or Girls Kids Water bottle for School & Travel
features: Playful Monster Design - This colourful 400ml kids water bottle features a fun blue monster face with googly eyes, making hydration exciting for little ones at home or on the go.
Built-In Foldable Straw Lid - Designed with a flip-up straw for easy drinking, this water bottle for kids helps reduce spills and supports independent use for school or travel.
Lightweight & Durable - Crafted from BPA-free plastic, this boys water bottle is both strong and lightweight—perfect for everyday use, lunchboxes, or outdoor adventures.
Great for School & Activities - The compact size fits easily into school bags, side pockets, and backpacks, making it a reliable kids water bottle for class, sports, or day trips.
Ideal for Boys or Girls - With its fun design and practical features, this bottle works equally well as a girls water bottle or boys water bottle, suitable for any playful personality.
Easy to Clean & Reuse - Dishwasher-safe for convenience, this reusable water bottle supports a sustainable lifestyle while keeping your child refreshed throughout the day.
description: Make hydration fun with the Sass & Belle Monster Water Bottle – a playful and practical choice for energetic little ones. Featuring a bold blue design with a friendly monster face and fun googly eyes, this eye-catching kids water bottle brings character to everyday drinks. Whether used at school, for travel, or during playtime, it’s the perfect companion to keep your child refreshed and smiling throughout the day. Made from durable, BPA-free plastic, this 400ml water bottle for kids is lightweight, safe, and built for repeated use. The built-in foldable straw makes it easy for young children to sip independently, while helping to prevent spills and messes. Its compact size fits neatly into backpacks, lunchboxes, or side pockets, making it an ideal choice for school, day trips, or outdoor adventures. Designed to appeal to a wide age range, this versatile bottle works equally well as a boys water bottle or a girls water bottle, making it a fun and thoughtful gift for birthdays, school starters, or stocking fillers. With its cheerful design and everyday functionality, the Sass & Belle Monster Water Bottle is a colourful and reliable choice for hydration on the go.
